title: gymnadenia pyrenaica
intro: Gymnadenia pyrenaica, also known as the Pyrenean fragrant orchid or Orchis pyrenaica, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a perennial orchid that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Gymnadenia pyrenaica often involve infusions or decoctions of the roots, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to apply the plant's medicinal properties.
